demo.title: brandkit.sh
demo.code:
# Author mode — NO key needed: validate/fill a hand-written style token
node brandkit.mjs --author --name "Neon Noir" --out brandkit.json

# Extract mode — derive a token from a reference image (Gemini vision)
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIza_xxx node brandkit.mjs \
  --from ref/moodboard.png --name "Neon Noir" --out brandkit.json

# The brandkit.json feeds promptpack + every generator + lookgate for one consistent look

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Author mode (--author) needs NO key. Extract mode (--from) uses Google Gemini vision: export GEMINI_API_KEY (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey).
Retarget any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint with --base-url / --model. Verify with `--dry-run` / `--schema` first.
